ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Sarah Nix, Esq., for Debbie Fitz, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel updates the court as to the status of administration, specifically the Inventory and Appraisal and petition. Counsel advises that the Estate should be ready to close soon.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-22-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 30, 2022 is admitted to probate. Debbie Fitz also known as Debbie A. Fitz is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. The will waives bond, however a minimum bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required for a non-California resident executor. Order for the same signed in open Court. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for December 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
